name: 街のよろず屋
outfit: Friendly community-service vest with rounded pockets, rolled sleeves, and a small crossbody pouch. Cheerful blue with yellow/green accents.

name: 福祉の守り手
outfit: Soft care-worker jacket or coat over pastel innerwear, pink heart badge, warm scarf, pouch pockets. Optional: small care bag.

name: 地域の風雲児
outfit: Energetic street-outreach jacket over a colorful hoodie, asymmetrical hem, rolled sleeves. Bold cheerful color accents.

name: 開拓するプロ
outfit: Pioneer specialist vest with a diagonal strap and pocket layout. A bit more adventurous than DASCG, a bit more expert than DASIG, but still soft.

name: 秩序の番人
outfit: Inspection marshal upper uniform: navy jacket, neat collar, armband, tidy belt. Optional: inspection clipboard.

name: 現場の目利き
outfit: Inspection coat with a fitted work vest underneath, small cute goggles resting on the head or collar, mitten-like hand accents.

name: 改革の現場指揮官
outfit: Field commander upper outfit: blue utility jacket, green-white diagonal sash, leadership armband. Optional: pointer baton.

name: 制度を変える技術者
outfit: Digital systems engineer upper outfit: blue tech vest with simple circuit motif, white zip shirt, small device pouch. Optional: tablet or laptop.

name: 支援の設計者
outfit: Support-planner vest with cream sash, heart-shaped chest badge, organizer pockets, pastel trim. Optional: planning clipboard.

name: 福祉政策の知恵袋
outfit: Welfare-policy advisor: blazer-cardigan hybrid, pale scarf, pocket badge, calm blue/pink accents. Optional: slim folder.

name: 共創のプロデューサー
outfit: Co-creation producer jacket with cheerful patchwork panels, workshop apron pocket, playful cuffs.

name: 社会変革の仕掛人
outfit: Social-change strategist coat with long flowing lines, diagonal accent stripe, layered scarf, warm visionary pastel colors. Optional: tablet portfolio.

name: 調整の達人
outfit: Coordinator suit-vest: vest over shirt, ribbon/tie, mediator sash, symmetrical pockets. Calm navy with green/yellow accents.

name: 法令の翻訳者
outfit: Legal interpreter blazer with book-shaped lapel badge, soft collar, scarf. Optional: small blank booklet.

name: 改革の語り部
outfit: Dialogue reformer jacket with soft scarf, expressive lapel badge, flowing capelet or shoulder panel.

name: 政策イノベーター
outfit: Policy-lab jacket with rounded geometric trim, innovation-colored piping, slim tablet pouch. Optional: tablet.

name: 縁の下の万能選手
outfit: Backstage support vest with rounded pockets, work gloves tucked into belt, muted blue/green accents.

name: 技術で支える人
outfit: Technical support work jacket with tool-belt at the waist, cushy cuffs. Optional: wrench. No jumpsuit or leg covering.

name: 現場発の改善者
outfit: Kaizen field jacket with rolled sleeves, arrow-like trim, quick-access notebook pocket.

name: 技術革新の推進者
outfit: Innovation engineer jacket with simple tech motif, compact utility belt, slightly crisper silhouette than FASCX. Optional: compact device.

name: 堅実な管理者
outfit: Facility manager upper uniform: navy work jacket, rounded plush-looking safety helmet, keyring belt detail, reflective bands across the chest/arms.

name: インフラの匠
outfit: Infrastructure craft upper outfit: rounded helmet, padded mitten gloves, reflective workwear jacket, simple chest strap. Optional: large wrench.

name: 現場改革の実行者
outfit: Operations reform jacket with leader armband, arrow-trim, rounded chest/waist cargo pockets.

name: 技術革新の先導者
outfit: Operations technologist upper outfit: rounded helmet/visor, tech work jacket, digital belt module, pale blue-gray accents. Optional: tablet.

name: 組織の潤滑油
outfit: Office-support cardigan vest with rounded collar, organizer pockets, ribbon/tie, understated green/yellow trim.

name: 制度設計の専門家
outfit: System designer jacket with simplified grid motif, neat cuffs, slim folder pocket, blue-white pastel palette.

name: 変革の設計者
outfit: Transformation designer coat with rounded modular panels, diagonal reform stripe, modern planner silhouette, fresh green/blue pastel accents.

name: 未来を描く技術者
outfit: Systems visionary jacket with simple circuit motif, layered high collar, slim tablet pouch, pale blue/silver accents. Optional: tablet.

name: 行政の守護者
outfit: Administrative guardian upper uniform: navy jacket, shield-shaped badge, sash, dignified but cuddly trim.

name: 精密な分析者
outfit: Data analyst blazer with simplified grid motif, cute glasses or magnifier badge, slim pocket panels, calm blue-gray pastel accents.

name: DX推進リーダー
outfit: DX leader blazer with digital sash, simple cloud/circuit pocket motif, bright blue-green pastel trim. Optional: laptop/tablet.

name: 戦略のアーキテクト
outfit: Strategy architect coat with long flowing silhouette, simplified blueprint motif, gold/green trim, dignified high collar. Optional: rolled blank plan tube.
